title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Specialist, Medical Officer and More
shortInfo: Employees' State Insurance Corporation ESIC Recruitment 2026 notification released for 17 Senior Resident, Specialist, and Medical Officer posts at ESIC Hospital Bibvewadi. Eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 01 June 2026 with required documents at the designated venue.

basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 17 Specialist, Medical Officer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation ESIC Recruitment 2026 notification released for 17 Senior Resident, Specialist, and Medical Officer posts at ESIC Hospital Bibvewadi. Eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview on 01 June 2026 with required documents at the designated venue.

application_fee.details: Senior Resident (3 Years): Maximum 45 years. Specialist (FTS/PTS): Not to exceed 69 years. Medical Officer: 35 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. of India Rules.

age_limit.maximum_age: Senior Resident (3 Years): Max 45 years. Specialist (FTS/PTS): Not to exceed 69 years. Medical Officer: 35 years.
age_limit.age_details: Senior Resident (3 Years): Max 45 years. Specialist (FTS/PTS): Not to exceed 69 years. Medical Officer: 35 years.
age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS from recognized institution, PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in relevant specialty, Registration with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council, Compulsory rotating internship completion
qualification.details: Full Time Senior Resident (3 Years) - Biochemistry: MBBS + PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in Biochemistry from recognized institution, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council. Full Time Senior Resident (3 Years) - Intensive Care Unit: MBBS + PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in Critical Care Medicine or equivalent from recognized institution, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council. Full Time Senior Resident (3 Years) - General Medicine: MBBS + PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in General Medicine from recognized institution, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council. Full Time Senior Resident (1 Year) - General Medicine: MBBS + PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in General Medicine from recognized institution, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council. Full Time Senior Resident (1 Year) - General Surgery: MBBS + PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in General Surgery from recognized institution, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council. Full Time Senior Resident (1 Year) - Ortho: MBBS + PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in Orthopaedics from recognized institution, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council. Full Time Medical Officer - DCBO Latur, Washim, Osmanabad, Gondia, Sinnar: Recognized MBBS degree, completed compulsory rotating internship, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council. Full Time / Part Time Specialist - Intensive Care Unit: MBBS + PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in Critical Care Medicine or equivalent from recognized institution, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council, 3 years experience after PG Degree or 5 years after PG Diploma. Full Time / Part Time Specialist - Pulmonology: MBBS + PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in Pulmonology from recognized institution, registered with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council, 3 years experience after PG Degree or 5 years after PG Diploma.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies released by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has released a total of 17 vacancies for the posts of Senior Resident, Specialist, and Medical Officer.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 01 June 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification includes MBBS from a recognized institution, PG Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the relevant specialty, and registration with NMC/Maharashtra Medical Council. Compulsory rotating internship completion is also required.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Medical Officer post is 35 years.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 56,100/- to Rs. 67,700/- Per Month.

faq.question: What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is Rs. 300/-.

faq.question: What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates (if required).

faq.question: Where is the ESIC Hospital located?
faq.answer: The ESIC Hospital is located in Bibvewadi, Pune, Maharashtra, with pincode 411037.

faq.question: Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable as per the Government of India Rules.
